# 新闻速递 2026-05-02

## AppLovin
- PFA Pension增持AppLovin 14万余股，表明机构信心增强，或支撑股价。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Davis Advisers增持AppLovin股份，显示机构看好公司前景，或为股价提供支撑。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxQbGVnSG85bllqMTNtSWRMcDNKdUtmVWNkUW51N2NKeDAtT1pCTVlDYmI4Z0JIV195S0JyWUVLeGNiUHJlYUVaZVdkbmFvM05pVUczTzFSZXBQV0Z2eGVBenhFdmlzWmNrRVVsZENacVM2Z2hBVHdjUk4xSGV2R0FsWFRIb0dFbExxekVkWVVKX2hFN3NBMTRGME13dko4V3k3NzJhc3AwWmtyWlFxZzlONGdtVkFobE1vdnUtYV9ZakZ2Y2xLcm1z?oc=5)）
- 提醒AppLovin投资者关注5月6日，暗示重要事件将临，或影响短期股价波动。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPR1NNdWN0TmxZb0JxMmxzLWE4X3pOeG9vcmlnLXkwakVmWW1NeDlUazg5dzNKbEJJeXkzZmNNUW85ZlkyWXl4LXhlZWN0VXhOUk9sRnNsLVRhN3JpckJra185ZE1zRllWaE1CN3BNa2gtNDBzbE1WYlU4UUFSdjRGVDRiRXJVeE1kLTZFY3NuZlhNY19JejlnMS1uSWdMa1k?oc=5)）

## Tencent
- 苹果国区App更新遇密码难题，影响如国区QQ邮箱注册的账户体验，增加跨区使用复杂性。（[V2ex](https://www.v2ex.com/t/1210000#reply3)）

## Coupang
- Coupang亏损预期调整，此变化将重塑其股票风险回报评估，影响股价走势。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre股价表现不一引投资者重估价值，或致股价波动但有望吸引新买家。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxQZlVLVGtUcE1xWGUwc3FpWXBRNjNYUEdFTVRXMC1jSlRRTWFJTUQyZlJlUXN5UWpCcmxIYjVFUUo1X01uZ3NnWjdjSTdlSzFnWHVQdmpfQXA1c25jRGEzUUlLSFFiUVNES3Nub1dTT1RwdTNpTXpUcjRyYXgwRllYaHRGRnhVV1dhUURxaTFaQ3RzZw?oc=5)）
